tool_args.label: Financial and Ridership Reports – October 2023
tool_args.raw_text: Metro-North Railroad Financial and Ridership Reports – October 2023. Steven Weiss, Financial Liaison.

tool_args.label: Total Revenue YTD October 2023
tool_args.raw_text: Total revenue of $712.9 million was $0.7 million higher than the Mid-Year Forecast

tool_args.label: Total Ridership YTD October 2023
tool_args.raw_text: Through October 2023 ridership was $49.4 million

tool_args.label: Ridership vs 2019 Pre-COVID YTD October 2023
tool_args.raw_text: 31.8% below 2019 pre-COVID levels (adjusted for the same number of workdays)

tool_args.label: Ridership vs Forecast YTD October 2023
tool_args.raw_text: 8.6% above the Forecast

tool_args.label: Commutation Ridership YTD October 2023
tool_args.raw_text: Commutation ridership of 19.0 million was 27.3% above 2022 and 9.0% above the Forecast

tool_args.label: Non-Commutation Ridership YTD October 2023
tool_args.raw_text: Non-Commutation ridership of 30.4 million was 23.1% above 2022 and 8.4% above the Forecast

tool_args.label: Farebox Revenue YTD October 2023
tool_args.raw_text: Farebox revenue of $454.3 million was $30.5 million higher than the Forecast

tool_args.label: Total Expenses YTD October 2023
tool_args.raw_text: Total expenses before non-cash liability adjustments of $1,438.6 million were $25.0 million or 1.7% favorable to the Forecast

tool_args.label: Headcount End of October 2023
tool_args.raw_text: At the end of October, the total headcount was 6,475, which was 38 higher than the Forecast of 6,437
